title: gladiolus speciosus
intro: Gladiolus speciosus is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iris family and is commonly known as the sword lily or gladiolus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus speciosus include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus speciosus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the roots and flowers of the plant.
